title: Network Communication Structure Description - Communication Functions in Fault Diagnosis

blocks.text: Network Communication Structure Description - Communication Functions in Fault Diagnosis

K-LINE is a communication circuit using UART (Universal Asynchronous Receiver-Transmitter), and its communication speed is 10.4 kbps. K-LINE is a communication circuit using UART (Universal Asynchronous Receiver-Transmitter) with a communication speed of 10.4 kbps.

The combination meter also has the function of displaying body system DTCs, which are displayed when the combination meter receives a SCS terminal short signal via F-CAN or a MICU service check coupler ON signal via B-CAN. At this time, the combination meter reads the self-diagnostic results from each control unit via B-CAN and displays the DTCs.
